## Overview

📌 This catalog is generated from the workspace-local skill directory and the configured external skill directory.

📌 Indexed skills: `446` total, `147` workspace-local, `41` user-level, `258` external.

📌 The recommended entry point for delegation is `skill-selector`, which should append `doublecheck` as the final verification step.

| `doublecheck` | `workspace` | Run a three-layer verification pipeline on AI-generated output using workspace-first evidence, source checks, and adversarial review. | `skill-selector` | `workspace` | Select and delegate the right skill for a task when the user asks which skill to use, pick the best workflow, route this request, find the right helper, or choose between multiple candidate skills. Always finish the delegation plan with the doublecheck skill as the final verification stage. | `selector, select, delegate, ask, pick, route, find, helper` |
